title: PackagedFluidCrafting
body:
PackagedFluidCrafting is an addon to PackagedAuto and AE2 Fluid Crafting Rework, and it completely overhauls AE2 Fluid Crafting's PackagedAuto support to be more like PackagedAuto's fluid crafting support in 1.18.2+. This mod requires MixinBooter.

Major changes this mod makes:
• The Fluid Processing recipe type is removed
• All Processing recipe types are changed to support fluid crafting with proper JEI support
• Amount of fluid can be directly edited in the Encoder
• Mekanism Gas crafting is now also supported if required mods are present
